# {{SHOW_NAME}} — Story Arcs & Continuity

_Show id: `{{SHOW_ID}}`. Created {{DATE}}._
_(Seeded from the new-show template — replace every [BRACKETED] prompt with real content.)_

The long-memory doc. The Series Bible says what the show IS; this says what has HAPPENED and what's been
PLANTED. Read this before writing any episode so callbacks land and continuity holds. Update it after every
episode.

---

## Running-gag ledger / continuity state

[Track the live state of each signature running gag so the next agent runs it consistently. e.g. for a
resurrection gag: which character is cursed, what stage they're on, what form they return as next.]

- **[Gag name]:** current state = [...]; next escalation = [...].

## Active arcs

[The slow-burn threads spanning episodes. For each: what it is, where it stands, where it's going.]

- **[Arc name]** — [status / next beat].

## Banked beats / long-fuse plants

[Setups deliberately planted to pay off later. List them so future episodes remember to cash them in. A
plant nobody pays off is a wasted joke.]

- **[Plant]** (planted in [episode]) → [intended payoff].

## Per-character threads

- **[Character]** — [their ongoing want / wound / running bit].

## Paid-off / closed

[Move resolved arcs and cashed plants here so the active lists stay short.]

- **[Closed thread]** — paid off in [episode].

## Continuity rules / canon facts

[Hard facts the show must not contradict — dates, deaths, who's related to whom, the rules of the world's
absurd logic. e.g. "there is no clean water, ever" / "the Product is never explained."]

- [Canon fact].
